title: Qualifications for Issuance of License for Recruitment and Placement of Filipino Workers
content:
Only those who possess the following qualifications may be permitted to engage in the business of recruitment and placement of Filipino workers:

1. Filipino citizens, partnerships or corporations at least seventy five percent (75%) of the authorized capital stock of which is owned and controlled by Filipino citizens.
2. Single proprietorships or partnerships with minimum capitalization of Two Million Pesos (P2,000,000.00) or corporations with minimum paid-up capital of Two Million Pesos (P2,000,000.00) (amended provision).
3. Those not disqualified by law or other government regulations to engage in the recruitment and placement of workers for overseas employment.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
